name: IRC_LI_RSC_SYNC_QUEUE
description: Stores the events that are to be synchronized as part of LinkedIn RSC integration

columns.Name: QUEUE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated

columns.Name: PROCESSOR_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to hold the thread ID for the multi tasking scenrio for RSC Sync

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the ORC Entitty.  Can be CANDIDATE_ID, REQUISTION_ID, SUBMISSION_ID.

columns.Name: ASSOCIATED_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the associated ORC Entity. Can be Person_ID.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of ORC entity. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_ENTITY_TYPE

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action to be excuted by the sync. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_ACTION

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of times this row was processed

columns.Name: PROCESS_AFTER_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the processing of this record should occur after a specified date or not.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
